creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Nate,

according to the history of ports/126345 [1], your approval arrived weeks
before the update patch, which means you probably cannot have tested it,
which again might be the reason why noone has thought it would be good to
commit it, yet.

Could you check the patch and send a followup to this PR, letting us know
if you think it's really OK to commit the patch?

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/126345
